Hallgrimskirkja.hoursNote: Church access is restricted during services and concerts. On May 2, the nave is closed about 11:30-12:45 for a lunchtime concert.

Harpa Concert Hall.hoursNote: The box office is open daily 10:00-18:00 and longer on event nights.

Thingvellir National Park.hoursNote: The stop itself is the national park; these hours are for the Hakið visitor centre and exhibition.

Kerid Crater.operatingHours: Open when the sun is shining.

Vok Baths.operatingHours: For your May visit window: daily 12:00-22:00.
Vok Baths.hoursNote: Guests can stay in the pools until 15 minutes before closing.

Earth Lagoon Myvatn.hoursNote: The official site says the lagoon is closed for construction from January 1, 2026 until spring 2026, so this one should be rechecked close to your trip.

Mia Optional: Blue Lagoon.operatingHours: For your May 9, 2026 visit window: daily 08:00-20:00.
Mia Optional: Blue Lagoon.hoursNote: Blue Lagoon asks guests to leave the water 30 minutes before closing.
